description: Product Description Locking Lids Food Storage This durable set of containers is perfect for storing leftovers or ingredients, transporting food, or packing personal meals and snacks. This set includes 3 round containers with locking lids. Made of transparent plastic, the containers make it easy to see the contents and feature a leak-proof locking lids to keep food fresher, longer.
